privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic event data created by setup_task.sh that defines a Banquet Event Order (BEO) for Miller-Tech Solutions. All 7 required content items (Miller-Tech, BEO-24-992, October 12, 2025, Smoked Salmon Bagels, Vegan Chia Parfaits, Wireless Lav Mic, and 4K Projector) are present in the event_logistics.json input file. The task requires creating an ODT document with at least 2 tables (Summary and Schedule) and a footer with page numbers and 'Internal Distribution Only' text. The verifier checks for file existence (10 pts), header information (15 pts), table structure (20 pts), specific content accuracy (40 pts), and footer presence (15 pts), requiring 70+ points to pass.
